headlines.headline: Holtum Asset Group names new head of automated logistics division

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a substantial $800M contract with a leading cloud platform is a clear and significant positive event, indicating a major revenue stream and strong market position.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
